title: 2Literal
description: Have you ever hated the way buckets look, and just wanted solid liquids in your hand? Well me neither! *and* its perfect for clickbait
body:
# ⚠ this is still a work in progress ⚠

yo just letting people know, i am still working on future updates, and have not abandoned this
for dev/incomplete releases go to: [github page](https://github.com/fre-shavacados/2Literal/tree/main) and please keep in mind im fairly new to this

this came from the idea that axiom's solid fluid hitbox feature and /tick freeze was a perfect way to build with fluid

now useing more vanilla textures & more efficient models

this curently includes:

![new icons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dba0ad10d51991af8355926b402d7a0680b69c3.png)   
the axolotl and tropical fish are animated but modrinth wouldent let me add a gif so just trust me                                                               
bucket of sulfur cube -> Sulfer Cube          
bucket -> Outline    
bucket of water -> water block    
bucket of powder snow -> powder snow block    
bucket of lava -> lava block      
bucket of milk -> milk block     
bucket of cod/tropical fish/salmon/tadpole/pufferfish/axolotl -> cod/tropical fish/salmon/tadpole/pufferfish/axolotl in a water block                     
sounds for the outline (I can't change milk eating sound unfortunatly)                      
**⚠NEW⚠** sulfur cube + animated textures



<details>
<summary>i have plans to add:</summary>

everything involved with bottles & tipped arrows
fire charges

</details>
